steps.title: Apply the constant shift
steps.content: Data set B is made by adding $56$ to every value in data set A. Adding the same number to every value shifts the whole data set without changing the spacing between values.

steps.title: Compare the medians
steps.content: The median of data set A is the $8$th value because there are $15$ values. Adding $56$ to every value also adds $56$ to the median, so the median of data set B is greater.

steps.title: Compare the ranges
steps.content: The range is maximum minus minimum. After adding $56$ to both the maximum and the minimum, the difference stays the same. $$ (\text{max}+56)-(\text{min}+56)=\text{max}-\text{min} $$ The answer is C.
